data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an override option for preferred clients to see full availability. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the override option but does not demonstrate its implementation or effectiveness, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation of the override option for preferred clients to see full availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the override option for preferred clients.
